headings.usage: Page titles, Section headers, Key Metrics
headings.instructions: Use for all emotional or high-impact text. Do not use for dense data.

data.usage: Financial figures, Dates, Status tags, Action buttons
data.instructions: Use for anything that needs precision or represents a 'system' value.

reordering_map.title: Resolution Center — Needs Attention
reordering_map.logic: What is on fire? The Inbox. Must be cleared first.

reordering_map.title: Weekly Brief — AI Actions
reordering_map.logic: Proof of work. 'What did you do for me?' Quick dopamine hit.

reordering_map.title: Founder Vitals
reordering_map.logic: Personal capacity check before taking on more work.

reordering_map.title: Strategic Focus
reordering_map.logic: The ONE thing to do after fires are out.
Deep reading. Bottom of page for 'Study Mode'.

buttons.action: font-mono text-[11px] font-semibold px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg transition-transform hover:-translate-y-0.5 border

instructions_to_main_agent: REORDER sections strictly according to the 'layout_strategy.reordering_map'.
GROUP the lower-priority sections (Financial, Operational, Strategic) into grid containers to reduce vertical scroll length.
MAINTAIN the existing content and mock data exactly.
ENSURE the 'System State' header remains sticky at the top.
USE the existing color variables and font definitions.
ADD 'data-testid' attributes to all reordered sections for testing.
universal_guidelines: Use generous padding (p-6, p-8) inside cards.
Avoid 'Inter' font; stick to the Playfair/DM Sans/JetBrains Mono stack.
All interactive elements must have hover states.
